text:
BOTTOM LINE — Tech sold off, defensives led, oil spiked. Software/AI earnings misses from IBM, NOW crushed Nasdaq, amplifying Q1 losses; semis offset via TXN +19%. Oil +4% on Hormuz tensions buoyed energy, utilities amid AI power demand.

INDICES — VIX 19.3 up 0.20%. QQQ -0.56%, SPY -0.39%, IWM -0.35%, DIA -0.36%. Small > large by 0.35pp. Oil USO +4.11%.

VOLUME — SPY vol_ratio 0.7x, QQQ losing vol. Elevated: XLI 1.3x (gaining+price up=accumulation), XLB 1.1x. Declining: XLE 0.6x (ignored despite price up).

SECTORS — XLU Utilities +2.72%, XLI Industrials +1.77%, XLP Staples +1.67%, XLRE Real Estate +1.15%, XLE Energy +0.78%, XLB Materials -0.04%, XLV Healthcare -0.10%, XLC Comms -0.42%, XLF Financials -0.79%, XLY Discretionary -1.00%, XLK Technology -1.42%. Top industries TAN +2.75%, UTES +2.39%; bottom IGV -5.83%, WCLD -6.39%.

THE 7s — Top5: Freight +4.50% (strongest FDX, weakest CHRW), Semi +3.43% (TXN +19%, weakest MU), Power +2.62%, Old Staples +2.12%, Buildout +1.88%. Bot5: Software -8.62% (NOW -17%, IBM -8%), New Metals -4.39%, Cloud -3.14% (IBM -8%, strongest ADBE), Mag -1.63%, Toll Road -1.42%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100%. Hawk 6 (Cook et al), neutral 5 (Powell), dove 4 (Bowman). Liquidity 44/100 normal, reserve scarcity 97th percentile stressed.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.83 elevated protection, skew +5.1% put fear. QQQ PCR_vol 1.65 high, skew +4.2%. VIX 19.3 below 20d MA 22.0 complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil +4.11% on Hormuz tensions lifted XLE +0.78%, XLU +2.72% via AI power. Gold -0.97% despite equity dip, dollar +0.18% pressured.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 59.3 neutral. Top movers TXN +19.43% Semi, CAT +3.33% Industrial, USO +4.11% oil. 20d mom: XLK +13.95% best sector, Semi +34.01% best basket; XLE -5.93% worst sector, Software -5.26% worst basket. Vol spikes TXN 4.3x +19% accumulation, MSOS 5.5x -17% distribution.

WATCH — TXN +19.43% vol 4.3x Semi breakout. NOW -17.75% vol 3.7x earnings fallout. RSPH -1.00% 5.8x vol EW health divergence.
